CompleteDescription: You've connected to your social network.
EventLogDescription: Hey thanks! You've connected to Facebook. Now share your favourite books, characters and quotes with your friends.
IncompleteDescription: Connect Facebook to your Reading Life to unlock the Facebook award.
Name: Facebook

CompleteDescription: Well, you're quite the social butterfly! You've shared on Facebook 10 times.
EventLogDescription: You're a total social butterfly - that's 10 shares to your friends on Facebook.
IncompleteDescription: 10 shares to Facebook will earn you the social butterfly award!
Name: Papillon

CompleteDescription: You're now part of Kobo, and an official Booklover!
EventLogDescription: BookLover. Welcome to Kobo! We're so glad you've joined us, a tribe of BookLovers, just like you.
IncompleteDescription: Want to become a Kobo BookLover? Sign in to your account, or create a new one today.
Name: BookLover

CompleteDescription: You've started to build a digital library with Kobo.
EventLogDescription: I <3 My Library. You've done it! You're building a digital library - your Reading Life will never be the same.
IncompleteDescription: Love your library - add a book or newspaper and we'll give you some loving with our Heart Award!
Name: I <3 My Library

CompleteDescription: You read all night long - congratulations from KITT - and Kobo!
EventLogDescription: Night Rider. You're an official Night Rider! KITT sends congratulations for reading all night long.
Name: Night Rider

CompleteDescription: You read five times between 4pm and 6pm - and escaped the afternoon rush hour.
EventLogDescription: Afternoon Rush Hour. You received the afternoon Rush Hour Award for reading 5 times between 4pm and 6pm!
IncompleteDescription: Read at the same time on 5 different days to unlock the award for your favourite reading time.
Name: Afternoon Rush Hour

CompleteDescription: Bottoms up! You read five times during the cocktail hour: 6pm - 8pm.
EventLogDescription: Bottoms up! You've read 5 times during Kobo Happy Hours, 6pm - 8pm.
Name: Happy Hour

CompleteDescription: Your TV is probably feeling lonely! You read five times during Primetime: 8pm - 10pm.
EventLogDescription: Primetime. You're TV is obviously off - it's primetime (8pm - 10pm) and you spent it reading with Kobo.
Name: Primetime

CompleteDescription: Everything is better in bed, including reading. You read five times during bedtime: 10pm - 12am.
EventLogDescription: Better in Bed. Everything is better in bed - including a good book. You just earned an award for reading five times at bedtime, 10pm - 12am.
Name: Better in Bed

CompleteDescription: Something wicked this way comes... you read five times during the Witching Hour: 12am - 1am.
EventLogDescription: The Witching Hour. By the pricking of my thumbs, something wicked this way comes! You read five times between 12am and 1am.
IncompleteDescription: Night owl? Read during this "scary" hour to earn this award.
Name: Witching Hour

CompleteDescription: Either you love zombies or you have insomnia - you just read five times during the Graveyard Shift: 1am - 5am.
EventLogDescription: The Graveyard Shift. Either you love zombies or you have insomnia - you just read five times during the Graveyard Shift: 1am - 5am.
Name: Graveyard Shift

CompleteDescription: You crushed the morning commute! You read five times between 7am and 9am.
EventLogDescription: Kill the Commute. You killed the commute and earned an award for reading five times between 7am and 9am.
Name: Kill the Commute

CompleteDescription: We know you didn't hit the snooze button! You read 5 times between 9am and 12pm.
EventLogDescription: Sleeping In. Congrats for keeping your hands off the Snooze button! You just received the Sleeping In award!
Name: Sleeping In

CompleteDescription: You just satisfied two cravings at once - you read during lunchtime: 12pm and 2pm.
EventLogDescription: I Eat Books for Lunch. You just satisfied two cravings at once: eating and reading! That earns you the Lunch Award.
IncompleteDescription: Try satisfying two cravings at once.
Name: I Eat Books for Lunch

CompleteDescription: You're totally off the hook - you read 5 times between 2pm and 4pm.
EventLogDescription: Playing Hooky. Congratulations on being totally Off the Hook! You just received an award for reading between 2pm and 4pm.
Name: Playing Hooky

CompleteDescription: You have so many eBooks your virtual bookshelf is creaking!
EventLogDescription: You have so many eBooks your virtual bookshelf is creaking!
IncompleteDescription: Consume mass quantities to earn this award.
Name: All You Can Eat

CompleteDescription: Want some coffee with that? You read five times during breakfast: 5am - 7am.
EventLogDescription: Eat It. We think you might need some coffee - you've read five times during breakfast, 5am - 7am.
Name: Eat It

CompleteDescription: You started reading a new book.
EventLogDescription: Once Upon a Time. You're diving into a brand new book - we sure hope it's a great read.
IncompleteDescription: It was a dark and stormy night... start a new book to earn the Once Upon a Time Award.
Name: Once Upon a Time

CompleteDescription: You highlighted your first passage.
EventLogDescription: We reserve the Inverted Comma Award for people just like you - folks who make highlights in their books.
IncompleteDescription: Want the Inverted Comma award? Select your favourite passages using our highlighting feature.
Name: Inverted Comma

CompleteDescription: That's 10 new definitions for you. Now, maybe it's time to go outside?
EventLogDescription: Word Up! You just looked up 10 new words with Kobo.
IncompleteDescription: Use your built-in Kobo dictionary to get the Word Up! Award!
Name: Word Up!

CompleteDescription: You've mastered the art of the long press - the best way to manage your library and dive into the details of a book.
EventLogDescription: You've mastered the art of the long press - the best way to manage your library and dive into the details of a book.
IncompleteDescription: Press and hold on a book in your library to earn this award.
Name: Pressed for Details

CompleteDescription: Clearly you couldn't put that book down! You read for two hours straight!
EventLogDescription: Page Turner. Clearly you couldn't put that book down! You read for 2 hours straight!
Name: Page Turner

CompleteDescription: You've finished a book. Is it true that "the good ended happily, and the bad unhappily"?(Thanks to Oscar Wilde for the quote!)
EventLogDescription: Not an Open Book. Congrats on finishing your book. Now tell someone to go shelve it!
IncompleteDescription: Finished reading? Close a book to earn this award. (No cheating please, real Booklovers read to the very end)
Name: Not an Open Book

CompleteDescription: You have endured all of the trials and earned the spoils of victory.
EventLogDescription: You have endured all of the trials and earned the spoils of victory.
IncompleteDescription: "The harder the battle the sweet of jah victory." - Bob Marley
Name: Highly Decorated

CompleteDescription: You have 10 Kobo Achievements. Clearly you've got what it takes to survive the literary wilds.
EventLogDescription: Nice work, Scout Leader! With 10 Achievements, you've got what it takes to navigate the literary wilds.
IncompleteDescription: You need 10 Kobo Reading Life Awards to earn the honor of Scout Leader!
Name: Scout Leader

CompleteDescription:
Make eReading more fun, social and meaningful 
 by building your Reading Life with Kobo. 
 
 You can track your reading life with interesting 
 statistics and celebrate reading milestones with 
 fun and surprising awards.
EventLogDescription: Welcome to Reading Life. Why, hello there!  We're so glad you've decided to try our reading application.
Name: Welcome to Reading Life

CompleteDescription: Go big or go home! You've turned 10,000 pages with Kobo.
EventLogDescription: Juggernaut. Go big or go home! You've turned 10,000 pages with Kobo.
IncompleteDescription: How do you get to be a Juggernaut? Hint: go big, or go home. Try War & Peace. Or maybe a couple of volumes of Proust.
Name: Juggernaut
